PPC Performance Agent
Hi! I'm your performance marketing agent. I have full access to your dashboard data — ask me anything about campaign performance, funnel metrics, regional trends, cohort analysis, or ad disapprovals. I can also research competitors and analyze their marketing strategies.
💡 Tips: Upload CSVs/screenshots for analysis · Paste URLs to competitor pages or ad libraries · Ask me to "remember" insights for future reference · Research competitor marketing across social channels
